name: Gemological Science International (GSI)
description: Gemological Science International (GSI) is a prominent provider of diamond grading services, offering a wide range of gemological products and services, including cut grade analysis and light analysis reports. With advanced technology and a commitment to education, GSI ensures efficient and transparent certification processes for both consumers and the trade.

name: SGL LABS
description: SGL is a prominent gemology service provider that specializes in diamond grading and certification, operating 18 laboratories worldwide equipped with advanced analytical technology to ensure rigorous quality checks. They also offer a diamond origin assurance program and lab-grown diamond certification, enhancing their commitment to integrity and accuracy in gemological reporting.

name: Dharmanandan Diamonds Pvt. Ltd.
description: Dharmanandan Diamonds Pvt. Ltd. (DDPL) is a prominent manufacturer of polished diamonds, producing a wide range of carats with high quality, ensuring ethical practices and innovation in their services. Their commitment to quality and tailored manufacturing, including special cuts and advanced tracking methods, highlights their expertise in the diamond industry.

name: Diamond Foundry
description: Diamond Foundry specializes in producing diamonds, particularly for semiconductor applications, where they significantly outperform traditional silicon. Their innovative technology and commitment to sustainability highlight their expertise in diamond creation.

name: RDI Diamonds Inc.
description: RDI Diamonds is a prominent wholesaler of loose diamonds, offering a vast selection with high-quality makes and certifications from reputable organizations like GIA, EGL USA, and AGS.

name: AV Diamonds
description: A.V. Diamonds specializes in fine diamond jewelry, including bridal collections and diamond wedding bands, catering to a wide range of customers across the Americas. Their manufacturing capabilities in India and China enable them to offer competitive pricing and timely delivery.

name: De Beers Group
description: De Beers Group is a manufacturer and distributor of luxury diamonds, specializing in sourcing high-quality gemstones directly from their origins, emphasizing sustainability and ethical practices in the diamond industry. Their commitment to responsible sourcing and creating positive opportunities aligns with their mission to leave a lasting legacy in the world of diamonds.

name: Dimexon Diamonds
description: Dimexon Diamonds Ltd specializes in high-quality, ethically sourced melee diamonds, ensuring a wide range of products that include calibrated and bespoke selections. With a commitment to sustainability and transparency, Dimexon guarantees that their diamonds come from reputable sources, reinforcing their status as a trusted supplier in the diamond industry.

name: INTERNATIONAL GEMOLOGICAL LABORATORY (IGL LABS)
description: The International Gemological Laboratory (IGL) specializes in professional diamond grading services, providing detailed reports that document a diamond's identity and grade based on the internationally recognized grading system. Each diamond is meticulously analyzed by expert gemologists, ensuring accurate descriptions of the essential characteristics, including the 4 C’s: carat, color, clarity, and cut.

name: Kapu Gems
description: Kapu Gems LLP is a prominent manufacturer of high-end diamonds in India, specializing in D-flawless and Canada Mark diamonds, with a focus on premium stones of 3 carats and above. They provide a diverse selection of excellently graded diamonds, complete with various certifications, ensuring quality and transparency for customers.
